data = open('/app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/my_stdlib.h').read()
addition = '''
#define EISDIR 21
#define EEXIST 17
#define EPERM 1
#define EBADF 9
#define EIO 5

#define EINTR 4
#define EAGAIN 11
#define EPIPE 32
#define EWOULDBLOCK 11
#define ENOSPC 28
#define ESRCH 3
#define EDEADLK 35
#define ENOSYS 38
#define ELOOP 40
#define ENAMETOOLONG 36
#define ENOTEMPTY 39
#define ENOTDIR 20
'''
data = data.replace('#define ERANGE 34', '#define ERANGE 34' + addition)
with open('/app/doomgeneric/doomgeneric/my_stdlib.h', 'w') as f:
    f.write(data)
print('Done')
